videos.title: Artificial Intelligence - What is AI?
videos.description: This video from CrashCourse provides a fantastic introduction to Artificial Intelligence, covering its definition, historical context, and the foundational idea behind its development, including the Turing Test.

videos.title: AI vs. Machine Learning vs. Deep Learning: What's The Difference?
videos.description: IBM Technology clearly explains the distinctions and relationships between Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Deep Learning—a crucial clarification for anyone starting to learn about AI.

videos.title: How Does Artificial Intelligence Work? | Tech Explained
videos.description: The Wall Street Journal offers an accessible overview of the basic mechanisms and core components that enable AI systems to function, demystifying the technology at a high level.

videos.title: The 3 Types of AI
videos.description: Simplilearn introduces the three main classifications of AI—Narrow AI, General AI, and Superintelligence—providing a framework for understanding AI's current capabilities and future trajectory.

videos.title: MLOps Explained: From Concept to Production (with Example)
videos.description: This video provides a practical introduction to MLOps, demonstrating the lifecycle of deploying machine learning models to production and the tools involved, crucial for successful AI launches.

videos.title: AI Business Models Explained: How To Make Money With AI
videos.description: Learn about various business models for AI products and services, including SaaS, API access, and value-based pricing, to understand how to monetize your AI solution effectively.

videos.title: How to Launch an AI Product | Product Strategy and Go-to-Market
videos.description: Gain insights into the strategic aspects of launching an AI product, covering market analysis, value proposition, and developing a robust go-to-market plan for success.

videos.title: What is MLOps and why you need it
videos.description: A concise explanation of MLOps, highlighting its importance in bridging the gap between data science and operations to ensure reliable, scalable, and maintainable AI deployments.

videos.title: AI Product Management: Creating Products with Intelligence
videos.description: Explores the unique challenges and best practices in managing AI products, focusing on understanding user needs, defining AI capabilities, and iterating for sustained value and monetization.
